summary: Completed testing of Premium Template Editors (iteration 9). All specialized template editors (Mathematics, Physics, Chemistry) with custom keyboards and Tanzania Syllabus formula references are working correctly. Sonner toast notifications are properly implemented (no window.alert calls).
passed_tests: Templates page loads and shows 6 template cards (Basic, Scientific, Geography, Mathematics, Physics, Chemistry)
Mathematics template opens MathTemplate with specialized math keyboard editor
Physics template opens PhysicsTemplate with specialized physics keyboard editor
Chemistry template opens ChemistryTemplate with specialized chemistry keyboard editor
Back button in each specialized editor navigates back to template grid
Math keyboard keys are clickable and insert symbols into textarea (tested π/Π)
Physics keyboard keys are clickable and insert symbols into textarea (tested ω)
Chemistry keyboard keys are clickable and insert symbols into textarea (tested H⁺)
Math formulas toggle button shows/hides Tanzania Syllabus Formulas panel
Physics formulas toggle button shows/hides Tanzania Syllabus Formulas panel
Chemistry formulas toggle button shows/hides Tanzania Syllabus Formulas panel
Math formulas panel shows FORM 1-2, FORM 3-4, FORM 5-6 sections with clickable formulas
Physics formulas panel shows Mechanics, Energy, Thermal Physics, Waves, Electricity sections
Chemistry formulas panel shows Stoichiometry, Gas Laws, Acids & Bases, Electrochemistry sections
Save button present and functional in all specialized editors
Export DOCX button present in all specialized editors
Sonner Toaster component renders (confirmed in DOM)
Toast notification appears on Save ('Template saved!')
No window.alert() calls exist in codebase (verified via grep)
Basic template opens generic TemplateEditor (no specialized keyboard)
Scientific template opens generic TemplateEditor (no specialized keyboard)
Geography template opens generic TemplateEditor with Questions inputs
Premium badges shown on Geography, Mathematics, Physics, Chemistry cards
Dark-themed keyboard CSS working (Math=orange, Physics=red, Chemistry=teal)
seed_data_creation: Used existing test user session and templates from previous iterations
context_for_next_testing_agent: Premium template editors fully implemented and tested. Math/Physics/Chemistry templates have specialized dark-themed keyboards with subject-specific symbols. Each has a Tanzania Syllabus Formulas panel with clickable formulas organized by Form level (1-2, 3-4, 5-6). Keyboard color themes: Math=orange, Physics=red, Chemistry=teal. All window.alert() calls replaced with Sonner toast notifications. Generic templates (Basic, Scientific, Geography) still use the original TemplateEditor. PesaPal payments remain MOCKED.

math_template_editor.details: MathTemplate opens with specialized math keyboard, orange-themed keys, Tanzania Syllabus Formulas panel with Algebra, Geometry, Calculus, Statistics sections

physics_template_editor.details: PhysicsTemplate opens with specialized physics keyboard, red-themed keys, Tanzania Syllabus Formulas panel with Mechanics, Energy, Thermal Physics, Waves, Electricity, Modern Physics sections

chemistry_template_editor.details: ChemistryTemplate opens with specialized chemistry keyboard, teal-themed keys, Tanzania Syllabus Formulas panel with Stoichiometry, Gas Laws, Acids & Bases, Electrochemistry, Thermochemistry sections

keyboard_key_insertion.details: Clicking keyboard keys inserts symbols into textarea at cursor position

formulas_toggle.details: Toggle button shows/hides Tanzania Syllabus Formulas panel in all specialized editors

back_button_navigation.details: Back button in specialized editors returns to templates grid

sonner_toast_notifications.details: Sonner Toaster component renders, toast notifications appear on Save action

no_window_alert_calls.details: Verified via grep - no window.alert() calls in codebase, all replaced with toast.success/error/warning

generic_templates_not_broken.details: Basic, Scientific, Geography templates still open generic TemplateEditor without specialized keyboards

premium_badges.details: Premium badges shown on Geography, Mathematics, Physics, Chemistry template cards and in editor headers
